sensitivity_note: delta v/v = -delta S_bounce = -4*pi delta eta_S. The external benchmark offset of -4.43e-6 corresponds to delta eta_S = -3.52e-7 (seventh-decimal-digit). This is below the BVP/quadrature method spread reported above; the limiting uncertainty in the EW closure is the independent saddle evaluation.
non_target_blind_note: This audit is target-blind: eta_S is computed independently of v_EW; no parameter is tuned to match the MuLan benchmark.
